main.description: Record containing a hypercerts post, e.g. an update, a report, a comment.

text.description: The primary post content. May be an empty string, if there are embeds.

facets.description: Annotations of text (mentions, URLs, hashtags, etc.)

replies.description: The subjects that this post is in reply to. Each entry identifies a thread root and the direct parent being replied to.

embed.description: The primary featured media for this post (images, video, external link, or quoted record).

labels.description: Self-label values for this post. Effectively content warnings.

tags.description: Additional hashtags, in addition to any included in post text and facets.

attachments.description: The files, documents, or external references attached to this post.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this post was originally created.

replyRef.description: Identifies the thread root and direct parent that this post is replying to.

root.description: The root record of the thread being replied to.

parent.description: The direct parent record being replied to (may be the same as root for top-level replies).
